message.content:
@startuml
actor Foo1 as Foo1
interface Foo2 as Foo2
database Foo5 as Foo5
note "I have a really long name" as Note1
entity Foo4 as Foo4
actor Foo3() as Foo3()

Foo1 -> Foo2 : To boundary
Foo1 -> Foo3() : To control
Foo1 -> Foo4 : To entity
Foo1 -> Foo5 : To database
Foo1 -> Note1 : To collections
Foo1 -> Foo1 : To actor

@enduml
